items.title: Your Agents Are Aging Too: Agent Lifespan Engineering for Deployed Systems
items.summary:
arXiv:2605.26302v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Long-lived AI agents are increasingly deployed as persistent operational systems, yet they are still evaluated like freshly initialized models. Day-one benchmarks miss a basic systems question: how long does an agent remain reliable after deployment?
